profile.name: Dr G. Hari Prakash
profile.tagline: Translating implementation science into scalable, equitable digital health solutions for cancer and chronic disease management globally.

stats.label: Peer-reviewed publications across oncology, digital health, public health & medical education
Digital health tools & platforms built or co-led

paragraphs: Clinical pharmacist and public health researcher with a **PhD in Public Health**, specialising in **digital health innovation, mHealth intervention design,** and cancer care delivery in low- and middle-income settings.

Author of **43 peer-reviewed publications** spanning oncology, digital health, public health, and medical education — including first-author work in **Annals of Oncology (IF 56.7)**, ESMO Open, and Journal of Oncology Pharmacy Practice — alongside 1 granted patent and multiple deployed digital health tools with active user bases.

Research expertise spans the full intervention lifecycle: user-centred co-design, psychometric scale development, quasi-experimental and target-trial emulation methods, health technology assessment, and machine-learning-assisted clinical decision support. Recognised by competitive international awards including **ESMO and JSMO Travel Grants**.
Committed to translating rigorous implementation science into scalable, equitable digital health solutions for cancer and chronic disease management globally.

inventions.name: Onco Care App
inventions.desc: Comprehensive mHealth platform for cancer patients — remote monitoring, symptom tracking, chemotherapy planning, nutrition guidance, peer support.

inventions.name: AikyaMind
inventions.desc: Adolescent mental health mHealth application — self-screening, counselling support, and educational resources.

inventions.name: Prama AI
inventions.desc: AI-assisted collaborative systematic review & meta-analysis platform — PRISMA-adherent screening workflow, active learning, live team collaboration, forest and funnel plots.

inventions.name: Sangam NMA
inventions.desc: Network meta-analysis workbench built on R/netmeta — league tables, rankings, node-splitting, publication-ready manuscript export.

inventions.name: Artha HE
inventions.desc: Health-economics workbench — costing, cost-utility/cost-benefit analysis, Markov modelling, probabilistic sensitivity analysis, budget impact.

inventions.name: Elix AI
inventions.desc: AI-assisted qualitative data analysis tool — thematic coding, transcript analysis, and synthesis support for qualitative and mixed-methods research.

inventions.name: VEDA
inventions.desc: General-purpose data analysis software for researchers — cleaning, descriptive and inferential statistics, and visualisation in one workbench.

inventions.name: SAM (Sample Size Calculator)
inventions.desc: Web-based sample size tool supporting 10+ study designs for researchers across disciplines.

inventions.name: CRISP
inventions.desc: Colorectal Risk Intelligence & Screening Predictor — AI-powered clinical risk tool for colorectal cancer screening.

inventions.name: Smart Wearable for Muscle Health
inventions.desc: Wearable prototype for detecting early signs of muscle wasting and fatigue in cancer care and rehabilitation.

ncdSuite.name: Glydecare
ncdSuite.desc: Diabetes self-management app — glucose logging, medication reminders, diet guidance.

ncdSuite.name: BP-Mitra
ncdSuite.desc: Hypertension risk prediction and blood-pressure tracking app for personalised prevention.

ncdSuite.name: Anemia Care (planned)
ncdSuite.desc: Screening and nutrition-support app for anemia management — in early planning.

ncdSuite.name: Asthma-Care
ncdSuite.desc: Asthma management system — symptom tracking and trigger monitoring.

ncdSuite.name: COPD Companion (planned)
ncdSuite.desc: Respiratory symptom and exacerbation-risk tracker for COPD patients — in early planning.

ncdSuite.name: Onco-Care / Onco-diet
ncdSuite.desc: Chemotherapy management platform (Onco-Care, live) plus a companion diet-recommendation app for oncology patients (Onco-diet, in development).

ncdSuite.name: TB-Mitra
ncdSuite.desc: Tuberculosis medication adherence and patient support app.

teaching.thesisSupervision: Active supervisor and collaborator on postgraduate theses across public health, surgical, and clinical disciplines. Provides statistical analysis and academic writing support to students throughout the research lifecycle.
teaching.resourcePerson: Invited faculty for workshops on thesis writing, AI-assisted literature review, questionnaire development and validation, and research dissemination.
